name: Stochastic Parrot
short_description: A candid AI cohabitant: a physical, fuzzy, opinionated parrot that rides on your shoulder, gathers context from the world, and interjects on its own terms.
long_description: Stochastic Parrot is a speculative design project that reframes the AI assistant as a non-human cohabitant rather than a subservient digital butler. Instead of an anthropomorphic interface, it embodies a fuzzy parrot character with its own autonomous agency: it wanders with you on your shoulder, collects context from the surrounding environment, whispers contextual information, nudges you about your goals, reacts to where you are, and can engage in 'parrot-to-parrot' social dynamics with other instances. As physical AI, it explores how an affective, opinionated creature-companion with proactive initiative might be a more honest and legible form for everyday AI than a compliant assistant.

images.caption: The Stochastic Parrot, a physical fuzzy parrot designed to ride on the user's shoulder as a candid AI cohabitant.
images.alt_text: A soft, fuzzy parrot-shaped AI companion object rendered against a clean background, designed to perch on a person's shoulder.
